flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Mount Marty University fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (49.0% → 41.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mount Marty University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.0k → $34.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mount Marty University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.0k → $34.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mount Marty University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (61.0% → 52.4%).
